existingLeads.title: Existing Leads
existingLeads.description: A list of existing lead records for potential candidates.

haveExistingLeadRecords.title: Have Existing Lead Records?
haveExistingLeadRecords.description: Indicates whether the vacancy has previously-created lead records (true) or not (false).

responseMessage.title: Response Message
responseMessage.description: A message that tells the user that leads were created for potential candidates.

errorMessage.title: Error Message
errorMessage.description: A message that lets the user know why the action failed.
